Building today what
The Bahamas needs to win tomorrow.

We'd rather show you than tell you

Discover the real progress being made through ongoing programs, community investments, and practical solutions designed to improve everyday life.

01

MyGateway

LIVE

More than 135,000 Bahamians already use it to access 168 government services online — and we're actively making it better.

02

National Artificial Intelligence Committee

COMING

The body that will govern how AI operates in The Bahamas — being established to make sure this technology works in the interest of Bahamians.

03

Bahamas AI Skills Initiative

COMING

AI training and literacy for every Bahamian — online and in person, on every island, at every level

04

Renewing Vision 2040

IN PROGRESS

The Bahamas' national development plan is being renewed and brought current — with the machinery to actually deliver it.

See all our progress →

A Ministry built to deliver

Our job is to help The Bahamas prepare for the future, solve national challenges, and deliver measurable progress. 

Not plans for their own sake. Not technology for its own sake. We use innovation, data, and partnerships to do one thing — make life better for Bahamians. Innovation raises productivity; productivity grows the economy; and a growing economy means more opportunity for you. 

We measure success one way: by what gets delivered.

More about the Ministry →

MIND has a clear mandate. We are giving Bahamians back their time by making government simpler and faster. We are making sure every Bahamian — wherever t hey live — can reach opportunity. And we are preparing our people for the jobs and industries that are emerging. That's the work. And we've already started.

Hon. Sebastian J. Bastian

Minister of Innovation and National Development

Everything we do points toward one thing — more opportunity for every Bahamian.

See how it all fits together →

Modernize Government

Government that's faster, simpler, and works on your behalf.

Build Future Readiness

A country prepared for what's next — from national AI governance to connectivity that reaches every island.

Develop Bahamian Talent

Bahamians equipped with the skills the future demands.

Drive National Development

A renewed national plan with priorities turned into real, measurable results.

Looking for a government service?

Apply for certificates, licences, and more — online, in one place, at MyGateway.

Go to MyGateway →

One Ministry, drawing the threads together

We draw together the institutions and the work that prepare The Bahamas for the future — national data, digital services, and the country’s long-term plan. Vision 2040 set the course for The Bahamas. This Ministry is built to renew it and help deliver it.

Vision 2040Bahamas National Statistical Institute
Department of Information and Communication TechnologyDigital Transformation Unit
See everything we're working on →

This is our country's future.
Help shape it.

The best ideas won’t all come from government. If you’re a citizen, a founder, a community, or a partner with something to contribute, we want to hear from you. This agenda is something you help build — not something you watch.

Get involved →

To help The Bahamas prepare for the future, solve national challenges, and deliver measurable progress.

Innovate Today. Transform Tomorrow.
